summary: P0 fixes validation completed - All 5 P0 fixes tested and verified working correctly. Backend AI endpoints (parse-invoice, compose-email) handle errors properly without crashes. Frontend XSS protection in ReminderTemplates successfully blocks malicious scripts. ReminderTemplates CRUD with AI draft flow works end-to-end. PublicInvoice renders without React key warnings.

Backend comprehensive test suite - 90/99 tests passed (90.9% success rate)
